description: Submitted content_hash does not match the SHA-256 of the JCS-canonicalized body (with the spec-defined exclusion set). Registry MUST reject with hash_mismatch (HTTP 400). The signature verifies against the submitted hash, but the hash itself is wrong for the body content.

input.notes: The submitted content_hash is all zeros. A correct hash for this body, computed per RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.7, would not equal that value.
